GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)  Z:(0,1/2,0)
GM1  GM2  GM3  GM4  (R)E1  (R)E2  (R)E3  (R)E4  (S)A1  (S)A2  (S)A3  (S)A4  (T)D1  (T)D2  (T)D3  (T)D4  (U)C1  (U)C2  (U)C3  (U)C4  (X)Y1  (X)Y2  (X)Y3  (X)Y4  (Y)B1  (Y)B2  (Y)B3  (Y)B4  Z1  Z2  Z3  Z4
